title: Chiki Aur Pehli Baarish
description: Chiki gilhari ki pehli baarish — tap tap, chupke chupke
description_en: Chiki the squirrel meets her first monsoon rain
cover_context: A small brown Indian palm squirrel (gilhari) with a striped back, sitting on a wide green pipal leaf, wide curious eyes, first monsoon raindrops falling around her, soft gold-green evening light filtering through leaves, warm earthy palette, watercolor storybook style, 512x512
raw_text:
Suno na bachcho. Aaj Chiki gilhari ki kahani.

Chiki ek bade pipal ke ped par rehti thi. Choti choti aankhein, bhuri si dumm, aur hamesha kuch na kuch chabati rehti.

[PAUSE: 800]

Ek shaam hawa thandi thandi chalne lagi. Sarr sarr, sarr sarr. Chiki ne upar dekha. Baadal kaale kaale aa gaye the. Arre, yeh kya ho raha hai?

[PAUSE: 600]

Phir tap. Ek bunda gira patte par. Phir tap tap. Aur phir tap tap tap tap.

Chiki chhup gayi bade patte ke niche. Baarish ki aawaz sunne lagi. Dheere dheere, jaise koi lori gaa raha ho.

[PHRASE] Chupke chupke, tip tip tip. [/PHRASE]
[MUSIC]

Pata hai, Chiki ko yeh baarish bahut achhi lagi. Ek chhota sa phal haath mein, patte ki chatri upar, aur aankhein band.

[PHRASE] Chupke chupke, tip tip tip. [/PHRASE]
[PAUSE: 1000]

Hawa dheemi. Baarish dheemi. Chiki ki neend bhi aane lagi.

Pipal jhoomta raha. Baadal gale milte rahe. Chiki ki saans dheere chalti rahi.

[PHRASE] Chupke chupke, tip tip tip. [/PHRASE]

Aur Chiki so gayi.
